title: spondias radlkoferi
intro: Spondias radlkoferi, also known as the Philippine yellow mamoncillo, is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Spondias radlkoferi include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the fruit, leaves, and bark of the tree can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
